query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: A large indoor ferris wheel with red and yellow illuminated spokes and enclosed passenger cabins, featuring a blue star-shaped sign with a yellow reversed letter R at its center. The structure sits within a multi-level interior space with an orange-lit ceiling, exposed metal ductwork, support beams, and upper-level railings visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large indoor ferris wheel photographed with intentional motion blur, its spinning red and yellow illuminated spokes rendered as bright spiraling streaks while enclosed passenger cabins dissolve into dynamic colored trails. A blue star-shaped sign with a yellow reversed letter R remains sharp at the center. The structure sits within a multi-level interior space with an orange-lit ceiling, exposed metal ductwork, support beams, and upper-level railings visible in the background, the long exposure creating a swirling impression of speed and light.
